difficulty_scale.3-4: Developing — light load or single-leg introduction, low contrast
difficulty_scale.5-6: Proficient — single-leg plyo, loaded, max-velocity, full contrast chains
difficulty_scale.7-8: Advanced — depth drops, high density, heavier load, reactive single-leg
difficulty_scale.9-10: Elite reserve — beyond current youth scope (placeholder for older athletes)

notes: min_tier is the SAFETY/competency gate (selection). difficulty is the inherent demand (1-10), used to balance session load and order progressions. They are related but distinct.

exercises.name: High-Knee Tuck (walking)

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Step through, pull knee to chest
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: High-Knee Run

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Pump arms, knees up, chest tall, soft steps
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Hurdler Walk (quad stretch)

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Grab top of foot, push hips forward, pause
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Butt-Kick Run

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Fire hamstrings, heel to glute, soft quick steps
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Figure-4 Walk

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Pull foot toward opposite hip, chest lifted
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Straight-Leg March

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Lift straight leg to opposite hand, abs lift
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Drop back knee low, mobilize the hip
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Balance and control, no stutter-step
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Push hips back, sink into foot, drive up
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Dynamic Waiter's Bow

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Kick leg out, toes up, dive chest down
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Prisoner Squat

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Hands behind head, chest lifted, elbows wide
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Overhead Toe Touch

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Reach overhead, sink hips back, touch opposite toe
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Fire Hydrant

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Lift knee to hip height, open the hip
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: Hip Circle

dose.all: ~10 yd or 5–10 reps; one pass, trim for lower maturity

exercises.cue: Extend leg behind, keep knee lifted high
exercises.notes: Base layer — runs every session, does not rotate.

exercises.name: SL Foot Isolations (ground absorption)
exercises.cue: Absorb the ground quietly, minimal bounce
exercises.notes: Opens the linear funnel.

exercises.name: Power Skip for Height
exercises.cue: Punch the knee up, drive vertical, stay tall

exercises.name: Horizontal / Distance Skip
exercises.cue: Push forward, cover ground

exercises.name: A-Skip
exercises.cue: Tall torso, clean arms, foot lands under hip

exercises.name: B-Skip
exercises.cue: Thigh ~90°, paw straight down, ankle flexed

exercises.name: Power B-Skip
exercises.cue: More force through the down leg, bigger separation

exercises.name: Straight-Leg Bounds
exercises.cue: Long stride, soft knee, claw the ground back

exercises.name: Bilateral Lateral Shuffle
exercises.cue: Low stance, don't cross the feet
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Lateral Movement
exercises.cue: Balance on one leg, foot/ankle control
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Line Hops (lateral + fwd/back)
exercises.cue: Quick foot contacts, light and reactive
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Lateral Power Shuffle
exercises.cue: Sit into hips, push off OUTSIDE leg, wide + low
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Karaoke — Power
exercises.cue: Big bounds, full range, rotate through hips
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Karaoke — Speed
exercises.cue: Quick high knees, torso upright
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Backward Run
exercises.cue: Kinesthetic awareness, quick controlled steps
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Backpedal
exercises.cue: Restore balance/symmetry, stay low
exercises.notes: CoD funnel doubles as knee-tracking prep.

exercises.name: Linear Pogo
exercises.cue: Stiff ankles, quick ground contact
exercises.notes: Ground-up tendon prep; opens speed sessions.

exercises.name: Lateral Pogo
exercises.cue: Quick, stiff, side to side

exercises.name: Single-Leg Pogo
exercises.cue: Stiff ankle, knee stacked over the toes

exercises.name: Vertical Jump + Stick
exercises.cue: Extend everything, land quiet, knees out

exercises.name: Box Jump (2-leg, step down)
exercises.cue: Swing arms, soft landing, step down (don't jump down)

exercises.name: Seated Box Jump
exercises.cue: From a dead stop — pure concentric power
exercises.notes: Removes stretch-shortening; teaches starting power.

exercises.name: SL Stick Box Jump (2-leg jump, 1-leg land)
exercises.cue: Stick silent, knee out over 2nd–3rd toe

exercises.name: Broad Jump (submaximal, 70%)
exercises.cue: Warm the pattern, land soft, knees out

exercises.name: Broad Jump (non-consecutive, stick)
exercises.cue: Jump far, land soft, knees out, freeze

exercises.name: MB Broad Jump (non-consecutive)
exercises.cue: Drive the ball, jump out and up, stick the landing

exercises.name: Broad Jumps (consecutive)
exercises.cue: Reactive — minimal ground time between jumps

exercises.name: Approach Broad Jump (2-step)
exercises.cue: Convert speed into the jump, explode on the plant, stick

exercises.name: SL Hops (forward, non-consecutive, stick)
exercises.cue: Hop, stick, reset — knee out every landing

exercises.name: SL Broad Jump (non-consecutive)
exercises.cue: Single-leg distance, stick and own it

exercises.name: Bounds (consecutive)
exercises.cue: Big scissor, claw the ground behind you

exercises.name: SL Bounds (consecutive)
exercises.cue: Same-leg repeated bounds — high force, controlled

exercises.name: RLE SL Bound
exercises.cue: Rear foot elevated start — max single-leg force

exercises.name: Skater Bound (stick)
exercises.cue: Push wide off the outside foot, stick and hold

exercises.name: Lateral Bound + Stick
exercises.cue: Push wide, stick and hold — no knee cave

exercises.name: Lateral Hurdle Hops (consecutive)
exercises.cue: Stay low, quick off the ground

exercises.name: Lateral Hurdle Hop → Lateral Box Jump (contrast)
exercises.cue: Quick sideways into one big lateral push
exercises.notes: Contrast chain.

exercises.name: 90° Rotational Hop + Stick
exercises.cue: Turn in the air, land balanced and quiet

exercises.name: SL Multidirectional Hops (clock, stick each)
exercises.cue: Hop to each point, stick every landing, knee stacked

exercises.name: Low Hurdle Hop (2-foot)
exercises.cue: Get off the ground fast, soft knees

exercises.name: Continuous Hurdle Hops (2-foot)
exercises.cue: No pause — minimize ground contact time

exercises.name: Hurdle Hop → Box Jump (contrast)
exercises.cue: Low-quick hops into one big explosion
exercises.notes: Contrast chain.

exercises.name: SL Hurdle Hops (consecutive)
exercises.cue: Single-leg, quick off the ground, controlled knee

exercises.name: Depth Drop (stick + hold)
exercises.cue: Step off, land soft and silent, freeze 2s
exercises.notes: Teaches absorption before reactive depth work.

exercises.name: Depth Drop (stick + hold) → Hurdle Hops
exercises.cue: Absorb soft, then attack the hurdles
exercises.notes: Contrast chain, S-tier reserve.

exercises.name: Depth Drop → 10-yd Sprint
exercises.cue: Land, absorb, GO — instant transition to sprint
exercises.notes: Highest-demand reactive plyo; never downstream of other max plyo.

exercises.name: Falling Start → Sprint
exercises.cue: Fall from the ankles, let gravity load the first step

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Start → Sprint
exercises.cue: Knee in line with toe, fire out flat and low like diving

exercises.name: Ground Start (back / stomach) → Sprint
exercises.cue: Push the ground away, drive out hard

exercises.name: 3-Point Stance Start → Sprint
exercises.cue: Weight forward, aggressive low first step

exercises.name: Resisted Sprint (heavy sled)
exercises.cue: Effort drill — stay low, punch the ground back

exercises.name: Resisted Sprint (light sled)
exercises.cue: Lighter load, longer push — stay aggressive

exercises.name: Lateral Shuffle → Sprint
exercises.cue: Plant the outside foot, redirect, go

exercises.name: Lateral Pogo → Sprint
exercises.cue: Stiff lateral pogos into an explosive redirect

exercises.name: Build-Ups (ramp to ~90%)
exercises.cue: Smooth acceleration, tall finish
exercises.notes: MAX-V family: never downstream of a heavy plyo block. Sub-maximal build-up (ramp to ~90%), kept short so it primes rather than drifting into flat-out speed-endurance.

exercises.name: Flying Sprint (build + fly zone)
exercises.cue: Don't sprint the build-up — max effort through the fly zone, run tall
exercises.notes: MAX-V family. ~20yd build into a ~20-25yd (≈10-30m) maximal fly zone — NOT a flat-out long run.

exercises.name: Flying Sprint — Added Exposures (higher volume)
exercises.cue: Same flying structure — max effort through the fly zone. The progression is MORE exposures, never a longer run
exercises.notes: MAX-V family, top rung. Progresses s_flying_sprint by ADDING quality fly reps/exposures (ramp high-speed volume ~5%/week), NOT by extending flat-out distance — the deprecated 40-60yd 'sprint with intent' is intentionally gone (hamstring-risk / speed-endurance drift).

exercises.name: Mirror Drill (reactive)
exercises.cue: Read the hips, react — first step fast

exercises.name: 5-10-5 Pro Agility Shuttle
exercises.cue: Chop the feet, sit the hips, knee out on the plant

exercises.name: Reactive Cone Cuts (coach calls)
exercises.cue: Don't guess — react. Sharp plant, knee out, explode out

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squat
exercises.cue: Chest up, sit between knees, knees track over toes

exercises.name: Box Squat (regression for knee drift)
exercises.cue: Push hips back, touch the box, drive up
exercises.notes: Use if knees shoot forward on the squat.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.cue: Front load = proud chest, knees track OUT

exercises.name: Light Barbell Front Squat
exercises.cue: Upright torso, elbows high, controlled

exercises.name: Split Squat (from lunge)
exercises.cue: Down the back knee, front knee tracks the toe

exercises.name: Decel Step-Up
exercises.cue: Pockets straight down, kiss the heel — own the eccentric
exercises.notes: Eccentric emphasis — control the lowering.

exercises.name: RLE Split Squat
exercises.cue: Rear foot elevated, vertical shin, knee tracks toe

exercises.name: SL Squat to Box
exercises.cue: Control all the way down to the box, knee tracks toe

exercises.name: Pistol Squat
exercises.cue: Full single-leg squat, controlled, knee over toe

exercises.name: Bodyweight Hip Hinge
exercises.cue: Push hips back, flat back, feel the hamstrings

exercises.name: KB / DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.cue: Hips back, load close, flat back, drive to stand

exercises.name: Single-Leg RDL
exercises.cue: Flat back, hips square, control the movement

exercises.name: KB Swing
exercises.cue: Hips drive the swing — snap the hips, arms along for the ride

exercises.name: Buddy / Nordic Hamstring Curl (assisted)
exercises.cue: Control the way down — fight gravity the whole way
exercises.notes: Eccentric emphasis; start with the lowering only.

exercises.name: Nordic Curl (full)
exercises.cue: Lower fully under control, pull yourself back up

exercises.name: Hand-Release Push-Up
exercises.cue: Elbows in, chest to floor, hands off at the bottom

exercises.name: Push-Up (4s eccentric)
exercises.cue: Slow down-phase, controlled, full range
exercises.notes: Eccentric emphasis.

exercises.name: DB Floor / Bench Press
exercises.cue: Smooth and controlled both directions

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Pull-Up (volume)
exercises.cue: Dead hang to chin-over. Chase monthly total reps
exercises.notes: Trained for volume; chase reps month over month.

exercises.name: Pull-Up ISO Hold (chin over bar)
exercises.cue: Hold chin over the bar, then lower slow
exercises.notes: ISO + eccentric emphasis.

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge
exercises.cue: Push hips back, sink into the foot, knee tracks toe

exercises.name: Cossack Squat
exercises.cue: Sit into one hip, other leg long, knee tracks the toe

exercises.name: Heavy Sled — High-Handle March
exercises.cue: Biggest step possible, drive and step through

exercises.name: Heavy Sled — Backward Drag
exercises.cue: Sink the hips, lean back, pull
exercises.notes: Backward drag is quad/knee-friendly — good for knee health.

exercises.name: Farmer Carry
exercises.cue: Stand tall, don't lean, walk with purpose

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.cue: Thighs parallel, knees out, quiet and still
exercises.notes: Iso — low soreness cost, great for youth.

exercises.name: RLE Lunge ISO Hold
exercises.cue: Hold the bottom, knee tracks toe, own the position

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.cue: Lower back glued to the floor

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.cue: Lower back pressed flat, hold without shaking

exercises.name: Plank Hold
exercises.cue: Straight line head to heels, breathe

exercises.name: Plank — Alternating Arm Reach
exercises.cue: Reach without letting the hips rotate

exercises.name: Pallof Press (anti-rotation)
exercises.cue: Resist the twist — brace, don't bend

exercises.name: Tall-Kneeling Pallof Press
exercises.cue: No leaning, brace hard, press straight out

exercises.name: MB Rotational Throw (wall)
exercises.cue: Power from the hips, turn through the ball

exercises.name: MB Rotational Slam
exercises.cue: Explosive — hips lead, finish through hard

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry (anti-lateral)
exercises.cue: One side loaded — don't let the torso tip

exercises.name: Standing Quad Stretch
exercises.cue: Relax, decompress, breathe

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Reach
exercises.cue: Relax, decompress, breathe

exercises.name: Hip Flexor / Couch Stretch
exercises.cue: Relax, decompress, breathe

exercises.name: Calf Stretch
exercises.cue: Relax, decompress, breathe

exercises.name: T-Spine Rotation
exercises.cue: Relax, decompress, breathe

exercises.name: Child's Pose
exercises.cue: Relax, decompress, breathe

exercises.name: Slow Breathing (4 in / 4 out)
exercises.cue: Relax, decompress, breathe

exercises.name: Glute Bridge (bilateral)
exercises.cue: Squeeze the glutes, drive hips up, pause at the top
exercises.notes: C-tier posterior-chain entry point for the hamstring family.

exercises.name: Standing Band Row
exercises.cue: Squeeze shoulder blades together, elbows tight to the ribs
exercises.notes: C-tier pulling entry point — no pull-up-bar strength required yet.

exercises.name: Double-Leg Forward Hop + Stick
exercises.cue: Two feet in, two feet out — jump forward, stick, freeze
exercises.notes: Bilateral bridge into the single-leg horizontal-jump family — primes the pattern before the SL gate.

exercises.name: Lateral Step + Stick
exercises.cue: Step wide, land soft, knee stacked over foot

exercises.name: Two-Foot Quarter-Turn Hop + Stick
exercises.cue: Quarter turn in the air, land quiet, knees soft

exercises.name: Partner Toss & Catch (both hands / single hand)
exercises.cue: Soft hands, eyes to the ball, catch out in front

exercises.name: Reactive Catch (partner cues, off-hand / off-angle)
exercises.cue: React late on purpose — track, adjust, secure it

exercises.name: Rotational Scoop Toss (med ball, into wall)
exercises.cue: Wind from the hips, throw through the middle, not the arms

exercises.name: Shuffle → Rotational Throw (med ball)
exercises.cue: Move, plant, then rotate and throw — sequence from the ground up

exercises.name: Bear Crawl (forward / backward / lateral)
exercises.cue: Flat back, knees under hips, opposite hand/foot — stay quiet

exercises.name: Animal / Crawl Complex (mixed patterns + direction changes)
exercises.cue: Flow between patterns, change direction on your own cue, control it
